prompt: Check my Go changes for issues. I wrote a session manager with in-memory storage for our HTTP service.
assertions: Review identifies race condition: CreateSession accesses sm.sessions without holding the lock
Review identifies race condition: cleanupLoop iterates map without lock
Review identifies race condition: UpdateSession accesses session without lock
Review flags path traversal vulnerability in ExportSessions/ImportSessions
Review identifies the global mutable activeCount variable as unsafe for concurrent access
Review flags ignored json.Unmarshal errors (CreateSession, ImportSessions)
Review identifies dead code: migrateV1Sessions and/or BulkCleanup
Review uses the P0-P3 severity format from the skill
Review identifies TOCTOU in DeleteSession (check-then-act with lock release in between)
